india_trends.title: Royal Enfield plans to set up manufacturing facility in Andhra
india_trends.summary: Royal Enfield is investing Rs 2,500 crore to build a new manufacturing plant in Andhra Pradesh. This expansion will boost production capacity. The company already has significant operations in Tamil Nadu. This move is part of Royal Enfield's strategic growth plans. The new facility will create emplo

india_trends.title: UnitedHealth falls after Berkshire sells stake in health insurer
india_trends.summary: UnitedHealth stock ​is up ​about 20% so far this year, after falling more than ⁠30% last year, which had made it the worst performer ​on the Dow Jones Industrial Average index in 2025.

india_trends.title: BTCC Exchange Celebrates Bitcoin Pizza Day with Mystery Pizza Campaign Featuring 1 BTC Grand Prize
Pharmacy associations to skip strike, major medicine disruption unlikely
india_trends.summary: A planned nationwide pharmacy strike on May 20 is unlikely to occur. Many retail pharmacy associations have withdrawn support. This follows assurances from the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation that concerns about e-pharmacies are under review. Public interest and patient welfare are cited

india_trends.title: Block deal: JSW Energy sells Rs 3,150 crore JSW Steel stake to GQG, SBI Mutual Fund
india_trends.summary: JSW Energy has divested a portion of its JSW Steel stake for Rs 3,150 crore to fund its aggressive power generation expansion. The company aims to reach 30 GW capacity by 2030, bolstered by both renewable and thermal power projects. This strategic move enhances capital allocation and supports long-t

india_trends.title: Adequate availability of petrol & diesel across the state of Assam: IOCL
india_trends.summary: Fuel supplies in Assam are stable. IndianOil, BPCL, and HPCL confirm adequate stocks of Petrol, Diesel, and LPG. The entire supply chain operates efficiently. Domestic LPG consumers are prioritized. The Oil Industry coordinates logistics and stock movement. Consumers can continue normal consumption.

india_trends.title: GIFT Nifty jumps nearly 1% after reports of US relief on Iran oil sanctions
india_trends.summary: GIFT Nifty rallied nearly 1% after reports indicated possible temporary US sanctions relief on Iranian oil exports. Hopes of additional crude supply eased inflation and energy shock concerns, lifting investor sentiment despite ongoing geopolitical tensions, volatile crude prices, rupee weakness, and

india_trends.title: GIFT Nifty jumps nearly 1% after reports of US relief on Iran oil sanctions - The Economic Times
india_trends.summary: GIFT Nifty jumps nearly 1% after reports of US relief on Iran oil sanctions    The Economic Times

india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea draws up ₹1 trillion cash strategy amid dues, capex push
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Idea's plan comes as analysts raise concerns about the company’s future payment obligations to clear spectrum dues, and the company is confident it can raise funds from a State Bank of India-led consortium.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: S&P 500, Nasdaq open higher as chips rebound, yields retreat
india_trends.summary: The ​S&P ​500 and the ​Nasdaq opened higher on Monday as ‌heavyweight semiconductor ⁠stocks ⁠recovered, while ​a bond market rout that ​had sparked a selloff ​the previous week ⁠appeared to ‌cool.

india_trends.title: Not activating countercyclical capital buffer, says RBI
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has decided not to activate the countercyclical capital buffer. This measure is not needed at this time. The buffer is designed to build capital in good times for use during difficult periods. It also aims to curb excessive lending. The framework was introduced after the 20

india_trends.title: SBI employees' federation stages dharna in Kolkata, plans nationwide strike on May 25-26
india_trends.summary: State Bank of India Staff Federation protested in Kolkata demanding recruitment and an end to mis-selling insurance. Employees will strike nationwide on May 25 and 26. The federation alleges issues with resolving employee concerns and agreements. Previous protests included badge-wearing and demonstr

india_trends.title: Multibagger Apollo Micro Systems stock jumps over 5% after strong Q4 results; rebounds 70% in under 2 months
india_trends.summary: Apollo Micro Systems saw a 5.6% rise to ₹311 as investors reacted positively to its strong March quarter results, reporting an 81.3% YoY revenue increase to ₹293.26 crore and a 163.5% jump in PAT to ₹36.79 crore.

india_trends.title: RBI imposes restrictions on Etawah-based Nagar Sahakari Bank for 6 months
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has placed restrictions on Etawah-based Nagar Sahakari Bank. Customers can withdraw a maximum of Rs 10,000. The bank cannot grant new loans or accept fresh deposits without RBI approval. These measures are in place for six months to protect depositors. The RBI will monitor

india_trends.title: 7 large-cap stocks post highest quarterly profits in 10 quarters
india_trends.summary: Several NSE large-cap companies reported record March 2026 quarterly profits, surpassing previous ten-quarter highs by over 25%. Strong operational performance, improved fundamentals, and favorable market conditions boosted earnings for firms including ABB India, JSW Steel, ICICI Bank, Bajaj Finance

india_trends.title: Strategy drops $2 billion in epic bitcoin buying spree
Strategy Inc sells $2 billion in stock, acquires 24,869 bitcoin
Flipkart Pulls Ahead: How India's E-Commerce Giant is Winning Hearts and Carts
india_trends.summary: From weekly active users to GMV share, two new institutional reports reveal that Flipkart is extending its lead over competitors and building a multi-business moat that rivals struggle to replicate.

india_trends.title: IDFC FIRST Bank Q4 shows deposit slowdown despite system-wide surge
india_trends.summary: Despite a system-wide rise in bank deposits, IDFC FIRST Bank’s March-quarter earnings showed a sequential slowdown in deposits after the Chandigarh fraud dented depositor confidence.

india_trends.title: Imagicaaworld to invest ₹100 crore in Gujarat water park as footfalls rise 5%
india_trends.summary: The announcement comes alongside the company’s Q4FY26 results, which showed revenue from operations of ₹91.9 crore; Footfalls across its parks rose 5 per cent year-on-year to 6.21 lakh visitors, signalling steady consumer demand
